mapper.sql: id, test_id, part_group_id, material_id, section_number, question_number, question_type, answer_mode, question_text, correct_answer, options_json, accepted_answers_json, case_insensitive, ignore_whitespace, ignore_punctuation, display_order, score, is_deleted
mapper.insert: insert into listening_question ( test_id, part_group_id, material_id, section_number, question_number, question_type, answer_mode, question_text, correct_answer, options_json, accepted_answers_json, case_insensitive, ignore_whitespace, ignore_punctuation, display_order, score, is_deleted ) values ( #{testId}, #{partGroupId}, #{materialId}, #{sectionNumber}, #{questionNumber}, #{questionType}, #{answerMode}, #{questionText}, #{correctAnswer}, #{optionsJson}, #{acceptedAnswersJson}, #{caseInsensitive}, #{ignoreWhitespace}, #{ignorePunctuation}, #{displayOrder}, #{score}, 0 )
mapper.select: select from listening_question where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select from listening_question where id = #{id} limit 1
select from listening_question where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 0 order by display_order asc, question_number asc, id asc
select from listening_question where test_id = #{testId} order by display_order asc, question_number asc, id asc
mapper.update: update listening_question set part_group_id = #{partGroupId}, material_id = #{materialId}, section_number = #{sectionNumber}, question_number = #{questionNumber}, question_type = #{questionType}, answer_mode = #{answerMode}, question_text = #{questionText}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, accepted_answers_json = #{acceptedAnswersJson}, case_insensitive = #{caseInsensitive}, ignore_whitespace = #{ignoreWhitespace}, ignore_punctuation = #{ignorePunctuation}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, score = #{score} where id = #{id}
update listening_question set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update listening_question set is_deleted = 1 where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 0
update listening_question set is_deleted = 0 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
update listening_question set is_deleted = 0 where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 1
